'''Cirrus''' was a [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] orbiting two orange [[Star/Legends|suns]]. It had golden seas and lovely [[City/Legends|cities]], including the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Ciran]] near a bay. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Talesan Fry]] and [[Gender/Legends|his]] parents.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Secrets of the Jedi (novel)|''Secrets of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
